reason: Verify implementation obeys Codex profile/project-config constraints and secret handling.
Check behavior preserves existing Claude cc-switch switching and extends it safely for Codex.
Check generated Codex profiles and launch changes do not break Codex hook behavior.
Check PTY env injection remains compatible with terminal runtime monitoring and hook env injection.
Check state changes are persisted and refreshed according to store conventions.
Check modal/sidebar UI follows component conventions and filters providers by adapter.
Check TypeScript changes avoid loose types and unsafe assertions.
